kanbanbot_prs.title: [KanbanBot] perf: replace transition: all with specific property transitions
[KanbanBot] refactor: extract renderOwnerBadge helper to replace IIFE in renderTaskCard
[KanbanBot] test: add missing coverage for customTitle, cwd, thinking block, and parseJsonlLine edge cases
[KanbanBot] refactor: move context-window constants into CONTEXT_WINDOW region
[KanbanBot] a11y: set aria-selected on keyboard-selected task cards
[KanbanBot] refactor: extract updateProgressBar helper to remove duplication

notes: npm audit shows 0 vulnerabilities. Tests: 85/85 planned (PR #33 pending merge, currently 79 on main). CSS perf: 16 transition:all replaced (PR #31). Coding: renderOwnerBadge helper extracted (PR #32). Context-window constants moved to correct region (PR #35). Eng: biome pinned as devDep blocked by protected files (Issue #34). A11y: aria-selected added to task cards for keyboard nav (PR #36). Refactor: updateProgressBar helper extracted to remove duplication between renderSession/renderProjectView (PR #37). Express v5 and chokidar v5 major updates still need issue discussion. CDN dep pinning is future work. Smoke test for /api/version as npm test is future work. All 5 existing PRs merge cleanly into main (verified 2026-04-09).
